arts.ttl: Spurs must believe in what Postecoglou is doing - Sutton
arts.sum: Chris Sutton discusses Ange Postecoglou's problems at Spurs and whether the 4-3 loss to Chelsea shows their style of play in unsustainable.

arts.ttl: Romero criticises Spurs board for lack of spending
arts.sum: Tottenham defender Cristian Romero criticises the club's board for a lack of investment following Sunday's disappointing 4-3 defeat home by Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou has January plan to turn Tottenham’s season around
arts.sum: The future of Ange Postecoglou at Tottenham has come under question in recent weeks as Spurs have made an underwhelming start to the 2024/25 campaign. The North London outfit currently sit 11th in the Premier League standings with just six wins from 15 and are also outside of automatic qualification places in the Europa League. arts.ttl: Cristian Romero hits out at Tottenham board as pressure builds on Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur defender Cristian Romero hits out at the club's board following a poor run of form which has led to scrutiny over Ange Postecoglou's position.
